staffhelp.title: 🛡️ Staff Commands - Orbital International
staffhelp.mod_desc:
`/limpar` - Clear messages
`/anuncio` - Send announcement
`/verificar` - Check who accepted rules
staffhelp.setup_desc:
`/setupchannels` - Auto-create language channels
`/regras` - Send rules panel
staffhelp.user_desc:
`/userinfo` - Show detailed user info
`/canalinfo` - Voice channel info
`/serverinfo` - Show all server IDs
